user.title: FlashForge Printer Setup
user.description: Choose how to configure your FlashForge printer

discovery.title: Discovering FlashForge Printers
discovery.description: Searching for supported LAN mode printers on your network...

select_printer.title: Select Printer
select_printer.description: Multiple printers found. Select the printer to configure.

credentials.title: Enter Check Code
credentials.description: Enter the check code for {name} at {ip} (Serial: {serial}). The check code can be found on the printer's display under LAN mode settings.

manual.title: Manual Configuration
manual.description: Enter your AD5X, Adventurer 5M, or Adventurer 5M Pro details manually

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the printer. Please check the IP address and credentials.
error.no_printers_found: No FlashForge printers found on the network. Please use manual configuration.
error.unsupported_printers_found: Only AD5X, Adventurer 5M, and Adventurer 5M Pro printers are supported by this integration.
error.discovery_failed: Failed to discover printers. Please use manual configuration.
error.unsupported_printer: Only AD5X, Adventurer 5M, and Adventurer 5M Pro printers are supported by this integration.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

init.title: FlashForge Options
init.description: Configure options for your FlashForge printer

data.override_led_availability: Always show LED switch (override printer capability check)
